name: orbit-monorepo
description: Orbit - Local AI Coding Agent Runtime

scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm build && pnpm test
scripts.verify:cli: pnpm exec eslint "packages/cli/src/**/*.ts" && pnpm exec prettier --check "packages/cli/src/**/*.{ts,md}" packages/cli/README.md && pnpm test:cli && pnpm --filter @orbit-build/cli build
scripts.verify:webui: pnpm exec eslint "packages/cli/src/runtime/webui/**/*.ts" packages/cli/src/runtime/RunCoordinator.ts packages/cli/src/runtime/RunCoordinator.test.ts packages/cli/src/runtime/CommandRouter.ts packages/cli/src/runtime/ReplController.ts packages/cli/src/tui/FullscreenTui.ts && pnpm exec prettier --check "packages/cli/src/runtime/webui/**/*.{ts,md}" packages/cli/src/runtime/RunCoordinator.ts packages/cli/src/runtime/RunCoordinator.test.ts packages/cli/src/runtime/CommandRouter.ts packages/cli/src/runtime/ReplController.ts packages/cli/src/tui/FullscreenTui.ts && pnpm test:webui && pnpm --filter @orbit-build/cli build
scripts.verify:package: pnpm --filter @orbit-build/cli build && pnpm smoke:cli && node scripts/verify-cli-package.mjs
scripts.verify:release: pnpm verify && pnpm test:coverage:critical && pnpm test:webui:e2e && pnpm smoke:cli && pnpm smoke:install && pnpm audit:prod && pnpm notices:check && node scripts/verify-cli-package.mjs
